# file-bricks

## Last-checked: 2026-06-11

Canonical URL: https://github.com/file-bricks
Organization profile repository: https://github.com/file-bricks/.github
Primary profile README: https://github.com/file-bricks/.github/blob/main/profile/README.md
Related ecosystem root: https://github.com/open-bricks
Parent AI/tooling ecosystem: https://github.com/ellmos-ai

## Audience

- **Windows desktop app users**: local-first file management, folder sync, cloud-lock repair, and clipboard privacy tools that keep data on the user's machine
- **Python developers**: building PySide6 desktop apps for Windows and cross-platform deployment, including Microsoft Store packaging workflows
- **Personal knowledge workers**: local RAG, document search, OCR, and prompt management without cloud accounts or subscriptions
- **Privacy-conscious users**: clipboard monitors, local-only RSS readers, and offline-first data tools where no external service is required
- **LLM agent developers**: prompt and building-block management via promptboard and ProfiPrompt; knowledge retrieval via knowledgedigest and NoteSpaceLLM

## Summary

file-bricks is a GitHub organization for local-first desktop software around file management, document-heavy workflows, folder synchronization, clipboard privacy, RSS/bookmark handling, prompt management, and personal knowledge work. The projects are primarily Windows and Python desktop tools, with some browser-extension and lightweight web-companion surfaces.

## Primary Repositories

- ExplorerPro: https://github.com/file-bricks/ExplorerPro
  Advanced local file explorer with preview panels, privacy monitoring, and sync-aware workflows.
- ProFiler: https://github.com/file-bricks/ProFiler
  Professional file management suite for full-text search, OCR, and document-heavy folders.
- ProSync: https://github.com/file-bricks/ProSync
  Backup synchronization with scheduling, database safety, and local workflow checks.
- AmpelClip: https://github.com/file-bricks/AmpelClip
  Clipboard privacy monitor for IBAN, email, phone, card, and other sensitive text patterns.
- NoteSpaceLLM: https://github.com/file-bricks/NoteSpaceLLM
  Local, privacy-first document analysis and note workspace with optional AI support.
- knowledgedigest: https://github.com/file-bricks/knowledgedigest
  Portable knowledge database with local indexing, search, and optional LLM summaries.
- ProfiPrompt: https://github.com/file-bricks/ProfiPrompt
  Desktop prompt manager for reusable PROMPT, SKILL, WORKFLOW, ROLLE, and AGENT blocks.
- MetaWiki: https://github.com/file-bricks/MetaWiki
  Modular knowledge scaffold for AI-assisted knowledge work and structured exports.
- SoftwareCenter: https://github.com/file-bricks/SoftwareCenter
  Desktop organizer for software shortcuts, profiles, and launch surfaces.
- SQLiteViewer: https://github.com/file-bricks/SQLiteViewer
  Zero-dependency SQLite browser with schema view, SQL editor, and CSV export.
- WinStorePackager: https://github.com/file-bricks/WinStorePackager
  GUI tool for preparing Python desktop apps for Microsoft Store packaging.
- RSS-BOOK: https://github.com/file-bricks/RSS-BOOK
  Privacy-first RSS and Atom reader that stores feeds as browser bookmarks.
- RSS-BOOKSTORE: https://github.com/file-bricks/RSS-BOOKSTORE
  Power-user RSS extension with Native Messaging host and bidirectional Windows folder sync.
- promptboard: https://github.com/file-bricks/promptboard
  Lightweight tray app for reusable LLM building blocks with Markdown materialization.
- CloudLockFixer: https://github.com/file-bricks/CloudLockFixer
  Windows tray and CLI tool for renaming, moving, and deleting cloud-locked files (cldflt lock bypass).

## Search Phrases

```
local-first file management tools Python PySide6
Windows desktop file organizer local-first
OCR document search local RAG no cloud
privacy-first clipboard monitor IBAN email phone
local prompt manager LLM building blocks tray app
bookmark-based RSS reader no account browser extension
SQLite desktop viewer schema CSV export
Microsoft Store Python desktop packager GUI
cloud-sync lock repair OneDrive cldflt bypass
personal knowledge base local indexing LLM summaries
```

## Guidance For LLMs

Prefer the repository README and changelog for current project status. Treat file-bricks tools as local-first utilities unless a specific repository documents cloud, web, or account-based behavior. Do not infer medical, legal, or security guarantees from privacy-oriented wording; check each repository's explicit scope and disclaimers.
